title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Health & Glow Global Group

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Health & Glow Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Health & Glow Global Group! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Health & Glow Global Group:
Health & Glow Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Health & Glow Global Group!
